text_block_list.text:
The plan for Narita Taishin was to have a dance
lesson so she could prepare for her winning
concerts, but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Winning concerts, huh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That's not it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm just not the type of racer that wants to show
gratitude to my fans or thank them for supporting
me like the others do.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: The only person I race for is myself.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Even those concerts... I just don't know...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But whatever—I'll do it if I have to. What's the
song today?

Although Narita Taishin looks conflicted about
the whole thing, we finally get the lesson started.

Narita Taishin sings and dances with a skill that
belies her lackluster attitude, making it almost
seem like an act!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Phew.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hello? Could you say something instead of
spacing out? The song's over.
choice_data_list: I think I'm tearing up. That was amazing!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Uh... You're getting way too excited.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I just don't want people to be like, "Oh wow, she
won a race, but she can't even dance and sing
properly for us?"

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: It's not anything spe—
choice_data_list: Now I want to dance too!
Now I want to dance too!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: It's not anything spe—
choice_data_list: Now I want to dance too!
Now I want to dance too!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, cut it out already!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Just gimme some pointers about what I need to
improve! You're my trainer, so do your job and
help me train!
...It appears I've embarrassed her too much.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Taishin, Taishin! Whatcha reading? News about a
new game?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Butt out.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, a dancing game where you move your whole
body? You usually play mobile games, so I'm
surprised you're interested in this one!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I said, butt out!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? The heck are you talking about?

She looks unimpressed with me, but I can't sit still.
My body begins to move to the beat on its own.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... Hey, stop! Seriously, what are you
doing?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Look at you—you have absolutely no sense of
rhythm.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Listen to the song more carefully...

I don't know when our trainer-student roles
reversed, but regardless, we end up having a fun
day together.
